title: Game Design Workshop
creator: Tracy Fullerton
description: A playcentric textbook that takes a game from initial idea through formal systems, prototyping, playtesting, iteration, and presentation. Exercises and examples make it usable as either a course or a self-directed process.
useful: One of the clearest complete introductions to designing around the experience of players rather than around features alone.
audience: Students, beginning designers, and teams looking for a repeatable playtesting-led process.
learning: Turn an experience goal into a playable prototype
Iterate formal and dramatic elements from evidence
